title: cleretum rourkei
intro: Cleretum rourkei, also known as the Klip dagumbo, is a low-growing, succulent shrub native to South Africa. It is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleretum rourkei include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
